sys_hub_action_instance_v2.comment: Send critical priority notification to the assignment group
Send resolution notification to the customer

sys_hub_flow_logic_instance_v2.comment: Check if state is Closed Complete
Iterate changed fields to detect assignment group reassignment
Check if the assignment_group field was changed
